_comment: One-line cards per allow-listed table. Embed each `card` field, retrieve top-k vs user question, feed only those tables to SQL-gen prompt. Cuts prompt size + sharpens routing. `engine` drives which DB pool executes.

cards.grain: one row per (date, brand, company, category_norm, state)
cards.card: Market daily aggregates. Competitor / market-wide brand, company, category rankings, totals, trends. Pre-aggregated revenue and quantity by day. Use for any 'top', 'best', 'rank', 'share', 'total', 'trend' question that names brand, company, or category without naming individual products.

cards.grain: one row per (date_d, state, company, product_name, unit)
cards.card: Market SKU-level snapshot. Individual competitor products: prices, THC%, unit/pack size, added/removed today, days on shelf. Use when the user wants product names, price filters, potency, or catalog churn IN THE MARKET (not their own).

Tenant's own wholesale orders. Customer purchases, line items, quantities sold, subtotals, open balances, order status (Completed/Pending/Cancelled). Use for 'my orders', 'what did I sell', 'top customers', 'open balance', 'pending orders'.

cards.grain: one row per (productName, tenant) — latest snapshot only
cards.card: Current on-hand inventory. Tenant's stock right now: current_qty, pending, remaining, lbs. No history. Use for 'in stock', 'low stock', 'what do I have', 'remaining units of X'.
Lot tracking + lab results. THC%, TAC, terpene %, expiration date, compliance lot id. Use for 'my lots', 'lot THC', 'expiring lots', 'lab results'.

Tenant's brand registry. isRhize=1 marks the tenant's own brand vs tracked competitor brand. Use for 'my brand', 'is X my brand', 'how many brands do I track'. NEVER scope by brand_id across tables — IDs collide cross-tenant.
Retail stores the tenant sells to. Name, slug, license number, city, phone, contact, isPartner flag, tier. Use for 'my retail accounts', 'partner stores', 'stores I sell to', 'store tier'.

Minimal partner customer roster (customer_name only). Use ONLY for canonical partner count helper (see project_active_partner_stores). Do not COUNT DISTINCT Company_Name on dataset_store — that field is a comma-joined list.
Strain metadata: effect tag, genetics parents, breeder, flavor notes. Use for 'genetics of X', 'flavor of strain', 'breeder of X', 'what effect is X'.
CRM action queue. Outreach tasks per customer with priority, category (MARKET/OUTREACH), status (New/In Progress/Done), offerSent flag. Use for 'follow-ups', 'open actions', 'sales tasks', 'CRM'.

cards.grain: one row per scraped product listing per day (tenant's own catalog scrape)
cards.card: Tenant's OWN catalog scrape with daily flag (Added/Removed/No Change). Dirty TEXT money/qty fields — always REGEXP_REPLACE then CAST. Use for 'my catalog', 'products added today (mine)', 'products removed today (mine)', 'my revenue', 'avg price by category', 'today's quantity total'. DEFAULT for 'added/removed today' unless user explicitly said 'market' or 'competitor'.

cards.grain: one row per (date, Product_Name, Company_Name) — tenant's own per-store scrape
cards.card: Slimmer per-store cut of the tenant's own scrape. Product, Category, Type, Company_Name (single store), SKU, date. Use for 'per store breakdown of my products', 'which of my products at store X'.
